content:
🔥 deptry | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To help Python developers maintain clean and accurate dependency lists in their projects, preventing issues caused by outdated, missing, or unnecessary packages.
✨ Key Features: • Detects unused dependencies • Detects missing dependencies • Detects transitive dependencies • Supports Poetry, pip, PDM, uv, and PEP 621 projects • Scans imported modules against declared dependencies
📖 Summary: Deptry is a Python command-line tool designed to identify and report dependency issues in Python projects. It checks for unused, missing, and transitive dependencies by analyzing imported modules against the project's declared dependencies.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
